heading: Course Description
text:
objective course expose students modern bioinformatics
studies specific focus analysis next generation sequencing
data. course lectures cover mix biological computational
topics necessary technical conceptual understanding current
high-throughput genomics techniques. include brief discussions 
molecular mechanisms assays, basic data analysis workflows, 
translating results biological conclusions.Students get hands-experience developing computational workflows 
perform end--end analysis sequencing data ubiquitous NGS
technologies including RNA-sequencing, ChIP-sequencing, Single Cell
RNA-sequencing. course emphasizes importance reproducibility,
portability, replicability modern bioinformatics.Classes traditional lectures exploring variety topics regarding
next generation sequencing labs focus practical activities meant
give experience working tools technologies needed 
analyses.Projects split weekly tasks majority evaluation 
final report produced project.
